## Request summary

What would you like ZHS to add or improve?

## Why this is useful

Who needs this, and in what situation?

## Related page or example

Paste a related ZHS page or an example/reference if available.

## Desired behavior

What should the tool/page do when this is finished?

## Notes

Please do not include private information, API keys, passwords, or sensitive personal data in this public issue.
